Text Effect Tools (Flame Text Source) for OBS Studio
====================================================

This plugin is free software licensed under the GNU General Public License,
version 2 (GPLv2), the same license as OBS Studio.

You are entitled to the complete corresponding source code for this binary.
The source code is published at:

    https://github.com/your-org/effect-tools      <-- replace with the real URL

A copy of the GPLv2 license text is included as LICENSE in the source
repository and is also available at:

    https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/gpl-2.0.html

If you received this binary without access to the source, please contact the
distributor (see buildspec.json "email") to obtain it.
